name: Creamy Marshmallow Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 6 oz package semisweet chocolate pieces (about 1 cup)
1 cup chopped almonds, pecans, or walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, evaporated milk, marshmallows, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until bubbles cover the entire top surface.
3. Boil for an additional 5 minutes while continuing to stir.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter, chocolate pieces, nuts, and vanilla.
5. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted and blended into the mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
7. Refrigerate until thoroughly cooled before cutting into squares.
